forward_patch:

+title: 'M6: skills preload (blocked on Skills M3) + semantics fill-in'
+---

Remaining M6 semantics per plan §5-7: tool allowlists per agent, model slot mapping edge cases, timeout/cleanup policy. DEPENDS on M4.
\ No newline at end of file
